name: theHarvester (Email & Domain OSINT)

auth.notes: Optional API keys for premium sources (Hunter.io, VirusTotal, etc.) via keys.yaml

performance.notes: Passive OSINT from web sources; speed depends on sources queried

agent_readiness.notes: Email, subdomain, IP, and URL OSINT harvesting. theHarvester -d example.com -b google,bing,linkedin. -b for data sources: google, bing, bing_api, linkedin, twitter, virustotal, baidu, duckduckgo, certspotter, hackertarget, dnsdumpster, etc. -l limit. -f output file (HTML/XML). Discovers: emails, subdomains, IPs, hosts, employee names. OSCP exam prep standard tool. Pre-installed in Kali. Social media employee enumeration.

gotchas: Google source often blocked (rate limited or CAPTCHA)
Results vary widely by source quality
API keys in keys.yaml for premium sources
Passive only — no active DNS resolution
best_when: Passive email and employee enumeration for phishing recon
avoid_when: When Hunter.io API direct access provides cleaner data
summary: theHarvester gathers emails, subdomains, IPs, and employee names from public sources. theHarvester -d target.com -b google,bing,virustotal,linkedin. Pre-installed Kali tool. API keys improve coverage. OSCP recon phase standard. Passive only — combines with amass/subfinder for comprehensive subdomain coverage. Key value: email and social media employee enumeration.
